fuses.description: ABS control unit [Vehicles without electric parking brake]

Engine control unit [Petrol engines]
Engine control unit [Diesel engines]

[Diesel engines] [Only for vehicles with MPI petrol engine]: Oil level and temperature sensor, High Power Heating Relay [diesel engines] / EGR cooler changeover valve [diesel engines] / Low power heating relay [diesel engines] / Boost pressure limitation solenoid valve [diesel engines] / Radiator fan control unit / Solenoid valve 1 adsorber [petrol engines] / Valve 1 of the intake valve timing control [petrol engines] / Valve 1 for exhaust valve timing control [petrol engines] / Oil pressure regulating valve [petrol engines] / Inlet cam adjuster cylinder 2 [petrol engines] / Exhaust cam adjuster cylinder 2 [petrol engines] / Inlet cam adjuster cylinder 3 [petrol engines] / Exhaust cam adjuster cylinder 3 [petrol engines] / Ethyl alcohol concentration sensor [petrol engines]

[Petrol engines]: Radiator fan control unit / Solenoid valve 1 adsorber / Valve 1 of the intake valve timing control / Valve 1 for exhaust valve timing control / Oil pressure regulating valve / Inlet cam adjuster cylinder 2 / Exhaust cam adjuster cylinder 2 / Inlet cam adjuster cylinder 3 / Exhaust cam adjuster cylinder 3 / Ethyl alcohol concentration sensor / High pressure valve for gas operation [Natural gas (CNG) engines] / Turbocharger bypass valve [Vehicles in GTI trim] / Intake manifold flap valve [Vehicles in GTI trim] / Piston cooling nozzle control valve [Vehicles in GTI trim]
Fuel pressure regulator [Diesel engines] [vehicles with MPI petrol engine]

Injector cylinder 1, 2, 3 & 4 [Vehicles with MPI petrol engine] / Fuel metering valve / Engine electronics power supply relay [Vehicles in GTI trim] / Gas shut-off valve relay [Natural gas (CNG) engines] / Gas supply valve 1, 2, 3 & 4 [Natural gas (CNG) engines]
Brake light switch
[Petrol engines]: Fuel pressure regulator / Charge air cooling pump / Gearbox oil cooling pump [Vehicles in GTI trim] / Coolant shut-off valve [Vehicles in GTI trim]
[Diesel engines]: Oil pressure regulating valve / Solenoid valve for coolant circulation circuit / Charge air cooling pump / Heater circulation pump / Radiator shutter actuator motor
[Petrol engines]: Lambda probe 1 before neutralizer / Lambda probe heating element / Lambda probe 1 after neutralizer / Lambda probe heating element 1 after catalytic converter

[Diesel engines] [Vehicles with E85 petrol engine]: Lambda probe 1 before neutralizer / Lambda probe heating element / Lambda probe 1 after neutralizer / Lambda probe heating element 1 after catalytic converter
[Diesel engines]: Glow plug control unit / Air flow meter / Heating resistor for engine crankcase ventilation system
[Petrol engines]: Ignition coil 1, 2, 3 & 4 with output stage

[Petrol engines] Exhaust flap unit / Secondary air pressure sensor 1 / Charge air cooling pump / Solenoid valve 1 adsorber / Valve 1 of the intake valve timing control / Valve 1 for exhaust valve timing control
Fuel pump control unit [Petrol engines]
Fuel pump control unit [Diesel engines]
